scenes.description: 小熊站在橙色木屋前,面露困惑,突然发现异常情况。
scenes.video_prompt: A yellow-furred bear wearing a blue overalls and a green hat stands in front of an orange wooden cottage, looking confused. The background features lush green plants and a bright blue sky with soft clouds. The art style is cartoonish with clean lines and vibrant colors. A slow zoom-in focuses on the bear’s expressive face. Natural daylight provides soft, even lighting. Camera: slow push-in. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Yellow bear in blue overalls and green hat, expressive facial features
style_elements.environment: Orange cottage, green vegetation, sunny sky
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, cartoon-style animation with bold colors and soft shading

scenes.description: 小熊惊讶地喊出‘太可怕了’,表情震惊,情节转折开始。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear gasps in shock, eyes wide and mouth open, exclaiming 'Too scary!' Its body leans back slightly in surprise. The same cottage and greenery remain in the background. The animation emphasizes exaggerated facial expressions typical of children's cartoons. Close-up shot highlights emotional reaction. Bright natural lighting enhances color contrast. Camera: tight close-up with slight shake for dramatic effect. Style: playful yet tense. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear showing exaggerated surprise, dynamic posture
style_elements.environment: Same outdoor setting with cottage and plants
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive cartoon animation with emotional exaggeration

scenes.description: 镜头转向巨大的豌豆藤蔓,上面有兔子和两只小猫的剪影,它们也显得惊讶。
scenes.video_prompt: Camera pans upward to reveal a massive pea vine growing rapidly, dominating the frame. Silhouettes of a rabbit and two kittens cling to the vine, their eyes wide with surprise. The vine twists skyward, its thick stem and large leaves detailed with texture. Background sky remains bright. Art style consistent with prior scenes—colorful, whimsical, and slightly surreal. Camera: slow upward pan with dolly out. Lighting: high-key daylight. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Silhouetted rabbit and two kittens on vine, showing fear
style_elements.environment: Giant pea vine rising into sky, cottage below
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical, exaggerated scale with vivid colors

scenes.description: 小熊继续表达震惊,藤蔓不断变高,仿佛面条一般伸展。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear points upward, shouting in panic as the pea vine stretches like noodles into the sky. The vine coils dynamically, resembling cooked pasta. The bear’s expression mixes fear and fascination. Background shows clear sky and distant treetops. Animation style maintains smooth motion and rich color. Camera follows vine movement with tracking shot. Lighting: bright and cheerful, contrasting with tension. Camera: lateral tracking with tilt up. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear gesturing upward, showing mixed emotions
style_elements.environment: Sky-high vine against blue sky, distant landscape
style_elements.visual_style: Playful exaggeration with noodle-like vine motion

scenes.description: 小熊担心小猫的安全,其他角色安慰他,强调团队合作。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear looks worriedly at the kittens on the vine. A second character (off-screen voice implied) reassures: 'Don’t worry, we’ll solve this together.' The bear nods, hope returning to its eyes. Scene includes gentle gestures and supportive postures. Background remains bright and open. Visual style: warm tones, expressive character animation. Camera: medium two-shot between bear and implied speaker. Soft focus on emotional exchange. Lighting: natural daylight with soft shadows. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear showing concern, other characters offering support
style_elements.environment: Outdoor garden setting with vine and cottage
style_elements.camera_movement: Medium shot with soft focus transition

scenes.description: 小动物们决定行动,准备营救被困在藤蔓上的小猫。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear and friends prepare to climb, gathering tools and determination. The pea vine now reaches rooftop level, entwining the cottage. Characters show focused expressions. Animation emphasizes teamwork and urgency. Background details include tangled vines on roof tiles. Style: energetic cartoon with motion lines. Camera: low-angle shot showing height and challenge. Lighting: midday sun with strong highlights. Camera: dynamic low angle with slight dolly in. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear and team preparing for rescue, determined looks

scenes.description: 小熊爬上屋顶,成功接近并救下小猫。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear climbs onto the roof, reaching the vine where the kittens cling. With careful movements, it rescues one kitten, hugging it safely. The rescued kitten smiles despite earlier fear. Roof shingles and vine textures are clearly rendered. Sky remains bright. Animation style: smooth, emotionally satisfying. Camera: crane shot following ascent and rescue. Lighting: golden-hour tint for warmth. Camera: crane-up to crane-down arc. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear rescuing kitten, gentle and heroic
style_elements.environment: Rooftop with entangled vine and sky view
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, uplifting animation with emotional payoff
style_elements.camera_movement: Crane shot arc from below to above

scenes.description: 小猫被救下后却表示还想再上去玩,小熊被藤蔓缠住像面条一样。
scenes.video_prompt: The rescued kittens giggle, saying they want to go back up. Suddenly, the bear gets wrapped by a loose vine, twisting like spaghetti. Comedy ensues as it struggles playfully. Expressions are exaggerated for humor. Background remains colorful and lively. Style: slapstick cartoon with bouncy motion. Camera: rotating around bear to show entanglement. Lighting: bright and cheerful. Camera: 360-degree orbit. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear tangled in vine, kittens laughing
style_elements.environment: Roof and vine structure, playful atmosphere

scenes.description: 小胡（新角色）出现,用创意方法解决藤蔓问题,制作工具帮助处理。
scenes.video_prompt: A new character, Xiao Hu (a clever fox in a workshop apron), arrives from a shed carrying a custom tool. He activates a mechanical device that gently retracts the vine. The design is whimsical and inventive. Other characters watch in awe. Workshop backdrop visible. Style: imaginative DIY aesthetic with steampunk hints. Camera: medium shot with cutaways to gadget details. Lighting: bright with metallic glints. Camera: static medium shot with insert cuts. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Xiao Hu (fox) with invention, problem-solving look

scenes.description: 众人合力将豌豆藤蔓移走,决定为它寻找新家。
scenes.video_prompt: The group works together to guide the vine into a cart. They decide to relocate it to a park as a decorative plant. The vine is now calm and coiled. Team effort shown through synchronized actions. Background transitions to garden path. Style: cooperative, feel-good animation. Camera: wide tracking shot following the moving cart. Lighting: soft afternoon glow. Camera: side-following wide shot. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Group collaboration, pushing cart with vine
style_elements.environment: Garden path leading to park entrance

scenes.description: 小猫在小熊怀里睡着,被妈妈接走,温馨团聚场景。
scenes.video_prompt: One kitten sleeps peacefully in the bear’s arms. Its mother arrives, thanking the bear warmly. The reunion is tender and quiet. Soft music underscores the moment. Background: sunset-lit yard. Animation uses gentle motions and soft edges. Close-up on embracing family. Lighting: warm golden hour with long shadows. Camera: slow zoom-out from embrace. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Kitten sleeping, mother cat reuniting with child
style_elements.environment: Yard at sunset, cozy and peaceful
style_elements.visual_style: Soft, emotional animation with gentle pacing

scenes.description: 为庆祝,准备豌豆米饭,但小猫因恐惧拒绝食用。
scenes.video_prompt: A bowl of steaming pea rice is presented with celebration. The bear smiles proudly, but the kittens recoil slightly, remembering the giant vine. Humorous hesitation shown through eye contact and body language. Kitchen interior with wooden table and utensils. Style: domestic charm with comedic timing. Camera: over-the-shoulder shot to close-up of food and reactions. Lighting: warm indoor light with soft highlights. Camera: OTS to close-up sequence. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Bear offering food, kittens hesitating comically

scenes.description: 大家举办盛大的豌豆舞会,庆祝事件结束,欢乐起舞。
scenes.video_prompt: All characters join a joyful 'Pea Dance Party' in the garden. Colorful lights, music, and dancing animals fill the scene. The bear and fox lead a fun choreography. Confetti and streamers enhance festivity. Background: night garden with lanterns. Style: vibrant, rhythmic animation with bounce. Camera: dynamic multi-angle shots with quick cuts. Lighting: festive colored lights with sparkles. Camera: multi-angle montage with handheld feel. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Entire cast dancing joyfully, energetic poses
style_elements.environment: Night garden with lanterns and decorations

scenes.description: 视频尾声,节奏放缓,展示和平宁静的生活恢复,角色微笑告别。
scenes.video_prompt: The party winds down. Characters sit together under stars, smiling contentedly. The cottage is restored, vine gone. Peaceful silence with soft music. Final shot pulls back into wide night sky view. Animation style: serene and reflective. Camera: slow dolly-out to aerial wide shot. Lighting: moonlit with soft glows. Emphasizes harmony and closure. Camera: slow dolly-out to aerial view. Resolution: 1920x1080, Frame rate: 24fps.

style_elements.visual_style: Tranquil, reflective ending with soft visuals
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow dolly-out to aerial wide shot
